gate_runs.detail: 4 modules audited (grantAdminImpl 0.82, LeaveGroupButton 1.0, MemberList 1.0, MarmotContext passed-after-fix), groups.tsx skipped (e2e-only). One real gap closed: autoCommitLeave.test.ts had a vacuously-true flatMap/.not.toContain assertion that passed with the fireAutoCommit catch deleted (guards AC-REMOVE-1) — assertion fixed to onCommitted.not.toHaveBeenCalled() + flat(2). Suite green 1197.

Round 1: 9/3/9 (3 fail: F1 make-admin-timing, F2 leave-blocked-timing, F3 openGroupDetail-view-assumption). Decider RETRY -> test-only fixes (idempotent openGroupDetail; await B-confirmed readiness before make-admin; await A admin-badge before leave). Round 2: 18 passed, 1 failed (AC-PENDING-5 setup), 2 skipped. Remaining failure is a test-design catch-22: badge-persists needs offline admin, observer needs online non-admin -> requires 3-context redesign. Production logic verified by S6 examiner.

Final: 18/18 passed on clean relay. Round1 9/3/9 -> test-sync fixes (idempotent openGroupDetail, await B-confirmed before make-admin, await A admin-badge before leave) -> Round2 18/1/2. Last failure (AC-PENDING-5 setup) was a 2-user catch-22 -> product-owner moved AC-PENDING-5 to manual (MV-4), 3 broken re-boot tests removed. A transient createGroup flake on the 8h-old relay cleared after relay restart. All 18 core-admin-behavior tests green.
